kpi_window_note: All % changes in this row are typically one-month (~30 calendar days); IBIT and ETHA may use 52-week figures when one-month Yahoo data is unavailable. Aggregate AUM % uses estimated weekly series. Fund-flow % compares 30-day Farside spot BTC/ETH ETF totals vs the prior 30 days. Dollar totals from StockAnalysis.
